OL 316 (REV. 7/2020) WWW
Autonomous Mode 
Conventional Mode
Additional information attached.
A Zoox vehicle in manual mode was stopped in stop-and-go traffic southbound on Montgomery St. at the intersection of Pine St. when it 
was struck from behind by vehicle 2.  Police were not called, and Zoox operators later reported injuries.
